---
title: "Science for All"
subtitle: "Interactive water science tools and public stories from the Wen Research Group"
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
---

::: {.science-intro}
Science for All brings together public-facing tools, open science projects, and water stories from the Wen Research Group. Explore cloud-hosted R Shiny apps for environmental data and listen to Waterlines, a podcast about how water shapes our world.
:::

::: {.panel-tabset .science-tabs}

## CUSE Water

::: {.science-tool-layout}
::: {.science-tool-card}
::: {.science-card-kicker}
Interactive app
:::

### CUSE Water

Explore water data through a cloud-hosted R Shiny app built for interactive public science and education.

::: {.science-status .science-status-live}
Live app
:::

::: {.science-actions}
[Open CUSE Water](https://cusewater.syr.edu){.btn target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.science-embed-shell}
<iframe class="science-embed-frame" title="CUSE Water interactive R Shiny app" src="https://cusewater.syr.edu" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>

::: {.science-embed-note}
If the preview does not load in this page, open the app in a new tab.
:::
:::
:::

## GeoNet

::: {.science-tool-layout}
::: {.science-tool-card}
::: {.science-card-kicker}
Interactive app
:::

### GeoNet

GeoNet is a cloud-hosted R Shiny app for exploring geoscience and environmental data through an interactive public interface.

::: {.science-status .science-status-live}
Live app
:::

::: {.science-actions}
[Open GeoNet](https://geonet.syr.edu){.btn target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.science-embed-shell}
<iframe class="science-embed-frame" title="GeoNet interactive R Shiny app" src="https://geonet.syr.edu" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>

::: {.science-embed-note}
If the preview does not load in this page, open the app in a new tab.
:::
:::
:::

## Waterlines

::: {.science-tool-layout .science-podcast-layout}
::: {.science-tool-card}
::: {.science-card-kicker}
Podcast
:::

### Waterlines

Waterlines: How Water Shapes Our World is a water-themed podcast that connects science, communities, and everyday life through conversations about water.

::: {.science-actions}
[Listen on Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/show/1ipZFdAHCUlO6IT1YBKPpq){.btn target="_blank"}
[Listen on Apple Podcasts](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/waterlines-how-water-shapes-our-world/id1877228351){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.science-podcast-panel}
<iframe class="science-podcast-player" title="Waterlines podcast Spotify player" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/1ipZFdAHCUlO6IT1YBKPpq?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="352" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="" allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::
:::

:::
